flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Kentucky fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Kentucky are 32% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($59.0k vs $44.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Kentucky rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (21.4k → 24.8k).
